page_metadata.biotools__summary: VirHunter is a deep learning method that uses Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and a Random Forest Classifier to identify viruses in sequencing datasets. More precisely, VirHunter classifies previously assembled contigs as viral, host, and bacterial (contamination).
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Deep Learning method for novel virus detection in sequencing data
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: VirHunter is a deep learning method that uses Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and a Random Forest Classifier to identify viruses in sequencing datasets.
